channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘The world of work is changing fast': Barely any workers think their job is safe as worries about AI refuse to go away
item.description: Although employment remains strong, widespread worker anxiety around AI continues, damaging productivity.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, July 20 (game #1638)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, July 20 (game #1135)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, July 20 (game #869)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: How to watch World Cup final replay – it's spoiler-free
item.description: Here's how to watch World Cup final replays and highlights for free online – without any spoilers as Spain took on Argentina in New York.

item.title: The Kodak EC35 is a pocketable, beginner-friendly 35mm film camera
item.description: The $35 camera comes in seven colors and has a slide cover.
